questions.question: In market economy, the question of what, how and for whom to produce are solved by the
Economic goods are termed scarce goods when they are
options: Not available insufficient quantities to satisfy all wants for them
Not produced in sufficient quantities to satisfy the effective demand them
Of primary importance in satisfying the needs of a society

questions.question: A school girl who needs a book and mirror, each costing five naira, decides to purchase the book instead of the mirror since she cannot pay for the two at the same time. Determine the real cost of her books
options: The five naira she spent on the book

In combining inputs x and y the entrepreneur obtains the maximum output from a given money outlay when
If units of a variable factor are increasingly added to a fixed factor and the marginal physical product keeps increasing, production is said to be taking place under condition of
options: Increasing returns to the variable factor
Constant returns to the variable factor

questions.question: At any given level of output, the total cost of a firm equals the
options: Marginal cost plus the average cost
Fixed costs less its variable cost
Average cost multiplied by its output
Economic costs multiplied by variable costs.

questions.question: At any given level of output, a firm’s total variable cost equals
options: Total cost less total fixed cost
Average variable cost and marginal variable cost

questions.question: Demand is relatively inelastic
options: In the P2 P4 price range

questions.question: Which of the following statements must hold if price discrimination is to be possible?
options: Elasticities in the various markets must not differ
The markets must not be separated but integrated
The markets should be separable but there should be no resale

questions.question: The ordinary partner in a partnership
options: Takes no active part in management of the business
has limited liability in case of business failure
Has unlimited liability in case of business failure
Cannot be sued personally on matters relating to the business

questions.question: A possible factor which limits the extent of growth of a firm is the
options: Unwillingness to share ownership and control

options: True spirit of co-operation is marred by delegated authority
Membership interest is centered on sharing of essential commodities

Its yield is a fixed rate of interest

options: Products are relatively cheap to transport to market centres
Products are relatively more expensively to transport are relatively more expensive to transport than the major raw materials
Raw materials can also be imported

questions.question: One disadvantage of trade by barter is that
options: People are happier when they exchange the same quantities of goods through the medium of money rather than by barter
The person wishing to buy good X may not have good Y which is what the other person wants
One person must always be cheated when trade takes place by barter
It increase the initial cost of producing goods

questions.question: One of the functions of Development Banks is to
options: Mint money for the development of the economy
Provide short-term loans to commercial banks
Provide medium and long-term finance for development of the banking system
Provide medium and long-term finance for the development of the economy

questions.question: To perform its function as a store of wealth and standard for deferred payment, money must be
options: Spent more on capital goods than on consumer goods

questions.question: Fiduciary issue is that part of
options: The issue of notes backed entirely by gold
A country’s currency which is not negotiable
The issue of notes not backed by gold

questions.question: An effect of inflation is that is
options: Favours debtors at the expense of creditors
Increases the real income of salary earners
Increases the value of a country’s exports

questions.question: Banks aid economic expansion and development by
options: Being very strict in lending policies

questions.question: The term ‘Stock of Capital’ means
options: Amount of money necessary to start a business
Total amount receivable by all factors of production
Amount of equipment plant and inventory existing at a time
Total amount available for economic development

options: Total tax rate less the marginal tax rate
The tax rate which applies to additional value of income

questions.question: Personal distribution of income implies
options: The way income is distributed among specific households or spending units
The distribution of income according to basic resource classes
Dividing income between personal taxes consumption expenditures and savings

questions.question: One of the advantages of international trade is that is
options: Promotes self-reliance and satisfaction with only what can be produced internally

questions.question: There is an improvement in the terms of trade of a country if
options: A large quantity of exports is given up to obtain a unit of imports
The volume of exports is greater than the volume of imports
A smaller quantity of exports is given up to obtain a unit of imports
The value of exports is greater than the value of imports

questions.question: Under flexible exchange rates, a deficit could be corrected by
The higher the dependency ratio the
options: Larger the proportion of the employed relative to the unemployed
Smaller the proportion of the active labour force relative to the inactive
Smaller the number of the non-working age groups relative to the active labour force

options: It is a major determinant of the standard of living
It reveals hazards of development like pollution and congestion

Its size determines the extent of political stability

questions.question: The Gross Domestic Product is defined as the total value of
options: All final goods and services produced in a country during the year
All assets of a country in a particular year
Exports net of total value of imports
